id.description: Unique scene id; used in output filename.

platform.description: Selects device frame + default store sizes.

source.description: Path to raw screenshot, relative to tools/screenshots/.

accent.description: Optional accent hex; defaults to brand pink.

tab.description: Android demo tab: circle|messages|you (for capture script).

scene.description: Optional deep-link scene name (for capture scripts).

sizes.description: Override the default sizes for this platform.
